# Huawei GPON ONT / EchoLife / OptiXstar — Default & Known Credentials
# Format: username:password
# Sources: IEEE, vendor docs, ISP configs, CVE disclosures, forum research
#
# --- Factory defaults ---
admin:admin
admin:
admin:password
admin:admin123
Admin:admin
root:admin
root:root
root:adminHW
user:user
user:HuaweiUser
# --- EG-series specific (EG8145X6, EG8141A5, EG8145V5-V2, etc.) ---
Epadmin:adminEp
Epuser:userEp
Eproot:admin
Eproot:adminEp
Eproot:root
# --- ISP-generated per-device passwords (Epuser) ---
# Pattern: 8-char alphanumeric random (uppercase+lowercase+digits)
# Loga Internet (ES/BR) — OptiXstar EG8145X6-10
Epuser:QFYqt7pU
# Sumicity/Giga+ (ES/BR) — EchoLife EG8145V5-V2
Epuser:pXU89goU
# --- Super admin / ISP provisioning ---
telecomadmin:admintelecom
telecomadmin:nE7jA%5m
telecomadmin:NWTF5x%RaijkX
telecomadmin:
telecomadmin:F0xB734Fr3@j%YEP
# --- Post-unlock / Personalizador ONT patch ---
superadmin:HW@root123
superadmin:superadmin
# --- Telnet / CLI ---
telnetadmin:telnetadmin
root:adminHW
# --- User-level / OptiXstar generic ---
user:HuaweiUser
user:user
# --- ISP-specific (Brazil — Sumicity/Giga+, Loga, Vivo, Oi, Claro) ---
admin:gpon
admin:Gpon1234
support:support
admin:Web@0063
admin:sumicity
admin:loga
admin:giga+
admin:gigamais
admin:vivo
admin:claro
admin:oi
admin:algar
admin:brisanet
# --- TR-069 ACS default credentials ---
admin:admin
acs:acs
# --- ISP-specific (LATAM / Europe) ---
digicel:digicel
vodafone:vodafone
useradmin:admin
useradmin:password
# --- Alternate / uncommon ---
admin:1234
admin:huawei

admin:hg532e
